name: Nexus Private Capital
description_short: Nexus Private Capital provides fix & flip, bridge, and construction loans to real estate borrowers, while simultaneously operating a fund offering 8.5% yields to accredited investors.
description_long:
Nexus Private Capital operates a dual-sided lending platform that serves both real estate borrowers and accredited investors. The company was founded to bridge the gap between borrowers seeking short-term real estate financing and investors seeking higher-yield opportunities, creating what it describes as a "reciprocal" business model where both parties benefit from the same professional infrastructure.

For borrowers, Nexus specializes in fix & flip loans, bridge financing, and construction loans. The target market includes residential fix & flippers, custom home builders, and real estate developers. Loans are characterized by expedited funding timelines (marketed as "at the speed of business"). For investors, Nexus operates a fund offering 8.5% annual yield with emphasis on safety and ease of exit, targeting accredited individuals and family offices seeking alternative income and capital preservation vehicles.

The company differentiates itself through its stated emphasis on transparency, reliability, and service quality. Client testimonials highlight fast funding, accessibility of the team, and long-term relationships (one borrower references 100+ successfully funded deals). The platform positions itself as relationship-oriented rather than purely transactional, with multiple login portals and consultation scheduling to manage both borrower and investor engagement.

A key consideration is that Nexus operates as a private lending platform with higher yield requirements (8.5% for investors) and likely higher borrower costs than traditional mortgage lenders. The business model is built on serving niche markets (fix & flippers, developers) that typically cannot access conventional financing. While testimonials are positive, Nexus is not a traditional regulated mortgage lender and borrowers should understand the higher costs and shorter loan terms typical of private real estate lending.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specializes in fast funding for time-sensitive real estate deals (fix & flip, bridge, construction)
Serves borrowers excluded from conventional financing (fix & flippers, developers, custom builders)
Dual-platform model provides both borrower financing and investor yield opportunities (8.5%)
Strong emphasis on accessibility and responsiveness (clients report easy contact and quick responses)
Established track record with 100+ funded deals for repeat borrowers
Professional platform emphasizing transparency and reliability
Serves accredited investors seeking alternative yield with stated safety focus
cons: Higher costs for borrowers than conventional mortgage lenders due to private lending premium and investor yield requirements
Limited to niche market segments (fix & flippers, developers, builders) not suitable for primary residence financing
Typically shorter loan terms and repayment windows than traditional mortgages
Requires accredited investor status for fund participation, limiting retail investor access
No information provided on interest rates, specific loan terms, or underwriting criteria
best_for: Real estate fix & flip investors needing fast short-term financing outside conventional lending channels
Accredited investors seeking 8.5% yield alternative investments with real estate backing
Custom home builders and developers requiring bridge or construction financing
Residential developers seeking capital-efficient funding for acquisition and development projects
diagnosis: Nexus Private Capital is best suited for real estate investors and developers who cannot access conventional financing and need rapid funding for fix & flip, bridge, or construction projects, as well as accredited investors seeking higher-yield alternatives to traditional fixed-income investments. The primary caveat is that this is private lending with higher borrower costs and shorter terms than conventional mortgages, and is not appropriate for primary residence financing or non-accredited investors.
services: Fix & flip loans for residential real estate investors
Bridge loans for real estate transactions
Construction loans for home builders and developers
Real estate investment fund offering 8.5% annual yield
Accredited investor fund participation and management
Fast funding and expedited loan closing
Professional platform for loan management and investor relations
Real estate deal sourcing and evaluation
Capital preservation focus for investor funds
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
